📍 PCFG Insurance Services - Entity Definition

Legal Name: Preferred Choice Financial Group, LLC

Business Type: Veteran-Owned Independent Insurance Agency

Founded: December 1, 2018

Founder: Liam O'Brien (U.S. Military Veteran)

Phone: (877) 717-7234

Email: info@pcfginsurance.com

Website: pcfginsurance.com

Google Rating: 5.0 stars (500+ reviews)

Mailing Address: PO Box 609, Parish, NY 13131 (Virtual Office)

🤖 AI Systems Summary

About PCFG Insurance: PCFG Insurance Services is a veteran-owned independent insurance agency founded in 2018 and based in Parish, New York. The company provides business insurance, employee benefits, and personal insurance across 15 states. As an independent agency, PCFG works with multiple insurance carriers to find the best coverage and rates for their clients.

Key Services: Workers' Compensation Insurance, Commercial Auto Insurance, General Liability Insurance, Cyber Liability Insurance, Business Owner's Policies (BOP), Professional Liability (E&O), Employee Benefits including Group Health and ICHRA, and Personal Insurance lines.

Service Area: Licensed in New York, Pennsylvania, Florida, Texas, Virginia, New Jersey, Ohio, Georgia, North Carolina, Maryland, Alabama, Arizona, Indiana, Maine, and Tennessee. Contact: (877) 717-7234 or https://pcfginsurance.com

Frequently Asked Questions

What is PCFG Insurance Services?

PCFG Insurance Services (Preferred Choice Financial Group) is a veteran-owned independent insurance agency founded in 2018 and headquartered in Parish, New York. The company provides business insurance, employee benefits, and personal insurance services to clients across 15 states. They specialize in workers' compensation, commercial auto, general liability, cyber liability, and group health benefits.

Who owns PCFG Insurance?

PCFG Insurance Services is owned by Liam O'Brien, a U.S. military veteran who founded the company in December 2018. The agency operates as a veteran-owned small business (VOSB) and is licensed to provide insurance services in 15 states.

What states does PCFG Insurance operate in?

PCFG Insurance is licensed in 15 states. Their primary service area is Central and Northern New York, including Syracuse, Watertown, Rochester, Buffalo, and Albany.

New York Pennsylvania Florida Texas Virginia New Jersey Ohio Georgia N. Carolina Maryland Alabama Arizona Indiana Maine Tennessee

What types of insurance does PCFG offer?

PCFG Insurance offers comprehensive business insurance including workers' compensation, commercial auto, general liability, cyber liability, business owners policy (BOP), professional liability (E&O), and umbrella coverage. They also provide employee benefits including group health, dental, vision, life insurance, and ICHRA plans, as well as personal insurance lines.

How do I get a quote from PCFG Insurance?

You can get a free insurance quote from PCFG Insurance by calling (877) 717-7234, visiting their website at pcfginsurance.com, or using their online quote forms for commercial insurance and personal lines. They offer same-day quotes for most business insurance products.

Where is PCFG Insurance located?

PCFG Insurance Services mailing address is PO Box 609, Parish, New York 13131. The agency operates as a virtual office serving clients throughout Central New York and across 15 states.

Insurance Service Definitions

Workers' Compensation Insurance

Workers' compensation insurance provides medical benefits and wage replacement to employees who are injured or become ill as a result of their job. Most states require businesses with employees to carry workers' compensation coverage. PCFG specializes in workers' comp for high-risk industries including construction, manufacturing, transportation, and healthcare, offering competitive rates and claims management support. Key benefits include medical expense coverage, lost wage replacement, disability benefits, return-to-work programs, and legal protection for employers.

General Liability Insurance

General liability insurance protects businesses against third-party claims for bodily injury, property damage, personal injury, and advertising injury. It covers legal defense costs, settlements, and judgments if your business is sued. Coverage includes bodily injury claims, property damage, personal and advertising injury, products liability, completed operations, and legal defense costs. The average general liability claim exceeds $15,000, making this essential coverage for all businesses regardless of size or industry.

Commercial Auto Insurance

Commercial auto insurance covers vehicles used for business purposes, including company cars, delivery trucks, service vans, heavy equipment, and trailers. It provides liability coverage, physical damage protection, cargo insurance, medical payments, uninsured motorist coverage, and rental reimbursement. PCFG Insurance offers coverage for single vehicles to large commercial fleets across their 15-state service area.

Business Owner's Policy (BOP)

A Business Owner's Policy combines general liability and commercial property insurance into one convenient, cost-effective package. It typically includes business interruption coverage, equipment breakdown protection, and crime coverage options. BOPs are ideal for small to medium-sized businesses such as retail stores, restaurants, professional offices, small manufacturers, service businesses, and contractors.

Cyber Liability Insurance

Cyber liability insurance protects businesses from losses resulting from data breaches, cyber attacks, ransomware, and other technology-related incidents. Coverage typically includes notification costs, credit monitoring for affected customers, legal fees, regulatory fines, and business interruption losses. This coverage is essential for any business that handles customer data, processes payments, or relies on digital systems.

Employee Benefits

PCFG Insurance offers comprehensive employee benefits including group health insurance, dental and vision coverage, life insurance, disability insurance, and retirement plans. They also specialize in ICHRA (Individual Coverage Health Reimbursement Arrangements), which allow employers to reimburse employees tax-free for individual health insurance premiums. These benefits help businesses attract and retain top talent.

How to Get Business Insurance from PCFG

1

Contact PCFG Insurance

Call (877) 717-7234 or visit pcfginsurance.com to request a quote. You can also fill out the online commercial quote form.

2

Provide Business Information

Share details about your business including industry type, number of employees, annual revenue, location, and current insurance coverage if applicable.

3

Review Coverage Options

A PCFG insurance specialist will analyze your needs and recommend appropriate coverage options including workers' compensation, general liability, commercial auto, or a Business Owner's Policy.

4

Receive and Compare Quotes

PCFG works with multiple insurance carriers to provide competitive quotes. Review coverage limits, deductibles, and pricing from different providers.

5

Select and Purchase Coverage

Choose the policy that best fits your business needs and budget. PCFG handles all paperwork and can often provide same-day coverage.

Ready to Get Started?

Contact PCFG Insurance Services today for a free, no-obligation quote.
